title: Compiled Rubric Rule
description: Schema for a single rule extracted from a rubric document. Each rule represents one evaluable criterion.

rule_id.description: Unique identifier for this rule, e.g. 'STRUCT-001'.

rule_name.description: Short human-readable name for the rule.

description.description: Full description of what this rule evaluates and what constitutes a pass or fail.

example.description: Optional example of a passing or failing case.

category.description: Category grouping for this rule, e.g. 'Structure', 'Completeness', 'Accuracy'.

is_autofail.description: If true, failing this rule fails the entire evaluation regardless of points.

points.description: Point value for this rule. Higher points indicate higher importance.

sub_conditions.description: For composite rules only. Each sub-condition must be evaluated, combined with the specified operator.

condition.description: Description of the sub-condition to evaluate.

operator.description: How this sub-condition combines with others. AND = all must pass. OR = any can pass.
